name: POST /api/users/accept-invite - Redeem an invite token + finish onboarding
description: Public consumer endpoint. Token IS the auth here — pass it alongside a password to create the User row at the role baked into the invite. Returns a fresh JWT so the new account can sign in immediately. 400 on expired / unknown / already-used tokens; 409 if the invite email collides with an existing user (race).
skipReason: Depends on POST /api/users/invite (admin-gated and currently manual). Re-enable in lockstep with the invite test once the runner has an admin bootstrap.

testCases.name: Accept invite with the captured dev token
